blended.narrative: Mont Blanc is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.4 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,126 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 47°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
